This 2 piece high-waisted swimsuit is a beautiful deep shade of red. At first glance it looks like a perfect fit but if you look at several pictures I’ve circled where it gaps a little and gathers funny along the outside edge of the top. I used their size chart and chose my usual S based on the bottoms so they would fit. For reference I’m 5’3”, 124 lbs, 34D, 37-27-37. I’m a little busty so usually when I get a S it’s a little snug or small in the cup. This fits my band pretty good, but the cups are slightly big and gap a little on the sides which is where I’m fullest. I’d say this suit will work best if you’re quite busty. If this top was any bigger I wouldn’t be comfy in it and if I had ordered the M based on my regular bra size the whole suit would be really big on me. There’s a lot to like about this suit, here’s my thoughts Pros: love the pullover style, so comfy without a back clasp, adjustable shoulder straps are a must for me, well made with quality fabric, there are plastic stays to support the seam where cups & band meet, love the high waist, the mesh trim is nice and there’s just enough ruching in the bottoms to help hide little sins like too much ice cream! Cons: sizing is way off on top, wish the bottom coverage was a little bit wider, ubiquitous triangle loose pads in top please y’all manufacturers and designers just sew them in or leave them out completely. I’ll probably remove these and if it’s too nippley I’ll wear silicone petals. I think that the pros far outweigh the cons and at less than $20 currently I highly recommend this suit especially for the ladies with larger chests!

Very flattering, soft and comfy! Top Quality. Also perfect as a bodysuit with shorts or jeans. The low cut in the back is very nice detail. It would probably look better with a bigger bust but I still love it! (I am 32B) I picked a size Small. Adjustable straps 💛

Pretty color and design, but it arrived with a huge hole in the mesh and the elastic connector on the inseam is cheaply located in the middle of band as opposed to the side seam. I will be returning. UPDATE: I received a replacement within a couple of days and it was perfect. I’m satisfied. For reference, I’m 5ft, 6in, 200lbs with a lil fupa & a lotta booty… 1X fit perfect.

I am soooo happy with this bikini!! It's sooooo cute I got a 1xl I'm 5'1 185 pounds and it's a LITTLE snug but not enough to complain!! I absolutely love this it's perfect I've never felt more confident!!!

Sensitive subject alert. I'm a 6' tall transwoman, and I haven't been swimming in public in years. Obviously, trends around bathing suits were very tiny for a loooong time, and I just don't have that kind of confidence. I wish I did, but... So, I was super excited to see this one. For as modest as it is, I think it's remarkably sexy, as well as feminine. It does everything in want it to as far as stretch and coverage, plus there's miles of space for trucking. I am DEFINITELY going swimming this year!

I got xl plus. I am 40 DD, xl shirts/dresses, 14/16 in pants. This bathing suit is the first one I’ll be wearing 10m postpartum. I was wearing leggings and tanks until I got this. It’s a great fit (I could’ve gotten a large plus too- I just didn’t want it too tight). I’m so comfortable heading to the beach with my family now. You need it

This bathing suit is SO cute! And it fits so well in the top section. I am 5’7” 188 lbs, 38 DD, and size 12 pants, ordered size XL plus (I think the plus is for the bust?). The only reason I’m giving 4 stars is because the shorts underneath are a little tight (not see through when you bed over but material stretches to white). Other than that I love it and will definitely order more colors!! Perfect modest bathing suit for my mom era

I think this suit is both flattering and comfortable. A little cheeky on the backside (for me). The drape in the front is a fun detail that helps hide my midsection, as does the ruching. The adjustable straps were needed. My only complaint is the white lining seems to want to peek out in both the front and back. For reference, I am 5’5”, fluctuate between 180-185lbs, 43-41-43, 38B. I ordered the XL.

I’ve never worn high waisted swim bottoms, but these are cute and comfy. The top, however, does not give the support I was hoping for when I was looking at bra sized swim tops. I feel like I am almost falling out the sides being a 38DD. I thought it would have more of a push up bra like support, it does not, so I feel like I’m just hanging there. The color is nice, but mine arrived with a blue ink spot on it before trying on.

I am 5’10, 240 pounds and I’m my 7th month of pregnancy. The top fit a tad bit tight but not uncomfortable. The bottoms fit great, not tight at all and just the tight amount of grip on the belly! Definitely recommend

I got this suit because I need something cute but also secure to chase the kiddos around the water park and beach this summer. I like the deep-V neckline that still offers modest and secure coverage, at least for a 38D. The cups are soft and comfortable but the main support for the chest is just the straps and adjustable back lacing. I was only a little disappointed that I needed to pull the laces tighter than I wanted in order to achieve the support needed for outdoor activities, leaving the strings pretty long. Other than that, the bottom part offers moderate but not full coverage. If my backside was any fuller, it wouldn't have such great coverage. The color is very vibrant, and the packaging includes care instructions and a good quality decorative gift box.

My wife loves her new bathing suit. She was worried about how her tummy looked in some of her old suits so she wanted to try this one. She is 6 feet tall so she also needed a suit with adjustable straps for the length. This suit is an excellent and comfortable fit lengthwise, and the rouching made her feel great about her middle area. The suit does have a lot of cleavage, and an interesting back, but for her that draws attention away from the Middle section. The buckle on the back was only slightly difficult the first time, but she opened and shut it a few times before putting it on and now can easily clasp and clasp with no problems. The suit was a big yes.

This suit is gorgeous. Unfortunately, the hard molded cups are about a size A/B. I am 5'5", weigh 165, and normally a size 10. I tried both a L & XL of this and neither worked because of the cup size. It's a shame, because the print is just so lovely. Not for larger sizes.

This suit is absolutely AMAZING! The fit is perfect and the bottom is super flattering for any body type. I am 5'10" 195 lbs and the size large was a perfect fit. The bottoms are cheeky, but not too cheeky and the high cut of the leg sits perfectly at the waist. The top stays in place even when body surfing in the ocean! I bought the leopard print and the bright orange color and the suits look exactly how they look in the photos. I cannot recommend this bathing suit enough for anyone! I will definitely be buying at least 2 more for this summer!!!

I'm a size 38DD and I bought a size XL. It's great quality, fits nicely and looks good. I love the back too and that you can adjust it to fit you perfectly using the strings. Also holds me up pretty well, which a lot of other's don't do so well.

Super comfortable, stretchy, and flattering! I wear a 40DD(Large tops) and 12/14 in bottoms. Ordered a XL and fits perfect!
